note: Gene-list accuracy is the objectively verifiable core. This eval file is disease-only: every keyword has at least 30 OpenTargets genetic_association gold genes in evals/.gt_cache, and gold_genes stores the top 30 by score.

evals.prompt: atopic dermatitis 관련 gene 목록 뽑고 각 유전자 문헌 정리해줘
evals.gold_source: OpenTargets MONDO_0004980 (atopic eczema) genetic_association >= 0.5, top 30 from evals/.gt_cache
assertions: recall of OpenTargets genetic gold genes in top-30 is reported
gold source is external DB cache, not LLM-curated
